metadata.name: Tactical Wine Fox
metadata.tips:
Tactical Wine Fox, also known as Operator Wine Fox.
Arriving in a modern world where swords and magic are no longer prevalent, Wine Fox serves as an elite operator in a quick reaction force under a certain organization, excelling in assault operations within enemy strongholds... (Can't write anymore
This is my first YSM work, the coloring is quite rough, and animations are being gradually improved.
Modified from New Texture Wine Fox 2.6
Current version 1.5
